title: A Dual-Energy Computed Tomography-Based Radiomics Nomogram for Predicting Time Since Stroke Onset: A Multicenter Study
authors_text: Jingxuan Jiang, Kai Sheng, Minda Li, Huilin Zhao, Baohui Guan, Lisong Dai, Yuehua Li.
abstract: Accurate estimation of time since stroke onset is critical for treatment eligibility decisions. This multicenter study develops a dual-energy CT-based radiomics nomogram to predict onset time, combining quantitative iodine maps and radiomic features. The model provides a clinically actionable tool for refining treatment windows in acute ischemic stroke.
